title: Multi-arch github-action workflow unification
body:
This is a port from the podman repository, of substantially the same
workflow with a number of bugfixes and readability improvements
compared to the original.  Same for the README.md updates.

The significant changes compared to the prior implementation are:

* Run periodically instead of only after every master push.
* Add a build for the "testing" image flavor.
* Fix a blank `org.opencontainers.image.source` value.
* Instead of pushing a `main` (or `master`) tagged image, use `latest`.
* Simplify use of env. vars. and workflow vars.

Note: Aside from a `s/podman/buildah/g` this commit makes the
buildah and podman workflows identical.  This is needed to better
support a smooth transition to a future/intended unification effort.

In other words, I intend to develop a single, shared workflow/script
that can be used for all three: skopeo, buildah, and podman.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [cevich] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

```diff
diff --git a/tests/validate/pr-should-include-tests b/tests/validate/pr-should-include-tests
index cd95cf67..4cc843df 100755
--- a/tests/validate/pr-should-include-tests
+++ b/tests/validate/pr-should-include-tests
@@ -49,6 +49,7 @@ filtered_changes=$(git diff --name-status $base $head |
                        fgrep -vx go.mod               |
                        fgrep -vx go.sum               |
                        egrep -v  '^[^/]+\.md$'        |
+                       egrep -v  '^\.github/'         |
                        egrep -v  '^contrib/'          |
                        egrep -v  '^docs/'             |
                        egrep -v  '^hack/'             |
```

Verified by running this against the podman version and running diff:
```
$ sed -e 's/podman/buildah/g' -e 's/PODMAN/BUILDAH/g' -e 's/Podman/Buildah/g' ...
```
LGTM so far
@cevich needs a `[NO TESTS NEEDED]` tag to get past the smoke test.

A few doc nits, and need to figure out the test issue. 
Changes LGTM

Thanks @edsantiago

@TomSweeneyRedHat Thanks for the feedback.  Though I'm willing to bet the same changes are also needed in podman, I'll try to take care of them both.
okay @TomSweeneyRedHat this one should be good now.  I manually verified the links, but it may not hurt to double-check.
Thanks guys.  Okay, I'll go press the manual-run button to confirm it actually works :wink:

Build for "testing" failed due to misconfigured repository permissions.  I fixed those and started a new build:

https://github.com/containers/buildah/actions/runs/817182981
